message:
bd-14j4 frame: add DataFrame fillna/dropna null-cleaning primitives

Implement pandas-style DataFrame null-cleaning defaults in `fp-frame`:

- Added `DataFrame::fillna(&Scalar)` for scalar replacement across all columns.
- Added `DataFrame::dropna()` with default row-wise any-null behavior (`axis=0`, `how='any'`).
- `dropna` constructs a deterministic boolean mask over the DataFrame index and reuses `filter_rows` semantics.

Coverage updates:

- Added `dataframe_fillna_replaces_nulls` unit test.
- Added `dataframe_dropna_drops_rows_with_any_null` unit test.

Parity documentation:

- Updated `FEATURE_PARITY.md` null/NaN semantics note to include DataFrame `fillna` + row-wise `dropna` defaults.

Validation run:

- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-frame
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --only=rust crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@

 | GroupBy core aggregates | in_progress | `FP-P2C-005` and `FP-P2C-011` suites green (`sum`/`mean`/`count` core semantics); broader aggregate matrix still pending |
 | Join/merge/concat core | in_progress | `FP-P2C-004` and `FP-P2C-006` suites green for series-level join/concat semantics; `FP-P2D-014` covers DataFrame merge + axis=0 concat matrix; `FP-P2D-028` adds DataFrame concat axis=1 outer alignment parity; `FP-P2D-029` adds axis=1 `join=inner` parity; `FP-P2D-030` adds axis=0 `join=inner` shared-column parity; `FP-P2D-031` adds axis=0 `join=outer` union-column/null-fill parity; `FP-P2D-032` adds axis=0 `join=outer` first-seen column-order (`sort=False`) parity; `FP-P2D-039` adds DataFrame merge `how='cross'` semantics (including suffix/indicator and invalid key/index guard rails); full DataFrame merge/concat contracts still pending |
-| Null/NaN semantics | in_progress | `FP-P2C-007` suite green for `dropna`/`fillna`/`nansum`; full nanops matrix still pending |
+| Null/NaN semantics | in_progress | `FP-P2C-007` suite green for `dropna`/`fillna`/`nansum`; `fp-frame` now also exposes DataFrame `fillna` and row-wise `dropna` (`axis=0`, `how='any'`) defaults; full nanops matrix still pending |
